name: Drawer
description: Displays modal supporting content from screen edges with dismissible focus-trapped behavior.

position.description: Defines the edge where the drawer is anchored.

open.description: Controls whether the drawer is visible.

onOpenChange.description: Callback fired when drawer open state changes.

disableScrim.description: Prevents scrim from rendering behind the drawer.

slots.children: Drawer body content, commonly including `DrawerCloseButton` and heading/content blocks.

keyboard: Enter / Space — activates trigger to open and activates close/content actions
Tab — moves to next focusable element within the drawer
Shift + Tab — moves to previous focusable element within the drawer
Escape — closes drawer and returns focus to trigger
aria: Drawer content remains modal while open; background is inert
Use labeled close action, e.g., `DrawerCloseButton` (`aria-label="Close Drawer"`)

inside: Task-oriented flows requiring temporary supporting UI
